sampleTexts.withPII: Hi, my name is John Smith and my email is john.smith@company.com. You can reach me at +1-555-123-4567.
sampleTexts.withoutPII: This is a simple message without any personal information.
sampleTexts.withCustomTerms: I work at TechCorp and my manager is Sandra Johnson.
sampleTexts.longDocument: This is a longer document that contains multiple pieces of personal information. My name is Alice Johnson and I work at DataTech Solutions. You can contact me at alice.johnson@datatech.com or call me at +1-555-987-6543. I live at 123 Main Street, Anytown, USA 12345. My social security number is 123-45-6789 and my credit card number is 4532-1234-5678-9012.
sampleTexts.emailOnly: Please send the report to manager@company.com
sampleTexts.multipleEmails: Send copies to john@company.com, jane@company.com, and admin@company.com
